patterns.reason: Message appears to be an authentication request

patterns.regex: wants you to sign in with your Ethereum account
patterns.reason: Standard Sign-In With Ethereum (EIP-4361) authentication request — does not transfer assets
Message contains urgency language commonly used in phishing attacks
Message contains claim/airdrop language — common in phishing and drainer attacks
Message requests seed phrase or private key — never share these
Message requests wallet verification — often used in phishing to extract approvals
Message contains security alert language — common social engineering tactic
Message references administrative operations — verify the requesting contract
